mapper.select: SELECT ir.*, mt.tech_name, mt.tech_price FROM inspection_request ir LEFT JOIN medical_technology mt ON ir.medical_technology_id = mt.id WHERE ir.register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY ir.creation_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE inspection_request SET inspection_result = #{inspectionResult}, inspection_employee_id = #{inspectionEmployeeId}, inspection_state = 'COMPLETED', inspection_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, inspection_remark = #{inspectionRemark} WHERE id = #{id}
